zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Goode於1568年10月27日之前出生在英國武斯特斯爾武坡 阿爾時，她的父親Henry Goode28歲，母親Joane Doane28歲。她於1589年10月7日與Francis Wakeman在英國武斯特斯爾易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1621年1月21日在英國武斯特斯爾維 科華士，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維 科華士。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Goode于1568年10月27日之前出生在英国武斯特斯爾武坡 阿爾时，她的父亲Henry Goode28岁，母亲Joane Doane28岁。她于1589年10月7日与Francis Wakeman在英国武斯特斯爾易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1621年1月21日在英国武斯特斯爾維 科華士，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維 科華士。

nameMeanings.name: Goode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Good  . This name has been used in Ireland since the 16th century.
Possibly an Americanized form of Dutch   Goede  .

variants.name: Good
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English gode ‘good’ (Old English gōd).

English: from the Middle English personal name Gode, representing either Old English Goda (male) or Gode (female), in part a byname and in part a short form of various compound names with the first element gōd, or perhaps a pet form of Old French names in God- such as Godfrey .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gut and Guth , or Dutch Goed and Goede .

nameMeanings.name: Anne

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Goode was born before 27 October 1568, in Upper Arley, Worcestershire, England, her father, Henry Goode, was 28 and her mother, Joane Doane, was 28. She married Francis Wakeman on 7 October 1589, in Eastham, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 21 January 1621, in Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, England, and was buried in Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Goode est née avant 27 octobre 1568, à Upper Arley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Goode, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joane Doane, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Wakeman le 7 octobre 1589, à Eastham, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 janvier 1621, à Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Goode vor 27. Oktober 1568 in Upper Arley, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Goode 28 und ihre Mutter Joane Doane 28. Sie hat am 7. Oktober 1589 in Eastham, Worcestershire, England Francis Wakeman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Januar 1621 in Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Goode è nata il prima del 27 ottobre 1568 nel Upper Arley, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Henry Goode, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Joane Doane, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Francis Wakeman il 7 ottobre 1589, nel Eastham, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1621, nel Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, England, e fu sepolta a Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Goodeが1568年10月27日以前にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウップエル アルリーで生まれた時，父Henry Goodeは28歳，母Joane Doaneは28歳であった。1589年10月7日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエアスサムでFrancis Wakemanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1621年1月21日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウイア フォーエストで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウイア フォーエストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Goode(이)가 1568년 10월 27일 이전 영국 워스스터실르 업퍼 알리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Goode(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Doane(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1589년 10월 7일 영국 워스스터실르 이스섬에서 Francis Wakeman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1621년 1월 21일 영국 워스스터실르 윈이르 포레스트에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 윈이르 포레스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Goode nasceu antes 27 de outubro de 1568, em Upper Arley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Goode, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joane Doane, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Wakeman em 7 de outubro de 1589, em Eastham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1621, em Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Goode родилась перед 27 октябрь 1568 г. в местности уппир арли, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Goode было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Doane, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Wakeman 7 октября 1589 г. в местности эастам, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 21 января 1621 г. в местности вир форест, ворсестиршир, Англия и была похоронена в местности вир форест, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Francis Wakeman el 7 de octubre de 1589, en Eastham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1621, en Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
